question: What is the amount of the gain accruing to JnJ as a result of the separation of its Consumer Health business segment, as of August 30, 2023?
gold_answer: JnJ will make a gain of approximately $20 billion from the separation of its Consumer Health business segment.
reasoning: The question asks for the gain accruing to J&J as a result of the separation of its Consumer Health business segment as of August 30, 2023. Looking at page 4, I find the relevant information in the paragraph discussing the completion of the Kenvue separation. The text states: 'As a result of the completion of the exchange offer, Johnson & Johnson will now present its Consumer Health business financial results as discontinued operations, including a gain of approximately $20 billion in the third quarter of 2023.' This directly answers the question - the gain is approximately $20 billion.
label: AL
